message:
fix: unskip prefix mismatch test and support Docker Dolt in integration tests

- Unskip TrackedRepoWithPrefixMismatchErrors (metadata.json is tracked, not
  gitignored; prefix detection uses config.yaml which survives clones)
- install.go: honor GT_DOLT_PORT env var for port availability check
- doltserver.go: add TCP reachability fallback in IsRunning() for Docker
  containers where no local dolt process is visible
- beads_db_init_test.go: handle bd v0.56.1 auto-commit in test helpers;
  stop removing metadata.json in clone simulation (it is tracked by git)
- manager.go: forward --server-port in adopt path for ephemeral test servers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
